name: Bacon, Lettuce and Salsa Sandwich
recipeIngredient: Wide slices of toasted good Italian bread
Thinly sliced or grated White cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine mayonnaise and salsa.
2. Spread the mixture onto the toasted bread.
3. Add layers of crispy bacon, arugula, white cheddar cheese, avocado slices, and chopped cilantro on top.
4. Turn off heat when adding ingredients to avoid overcooking or burning.
